overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dense forest at night, following a narrow dirt path illuminated by a flashlight or ambient light source. The footage appears to be from a survival horror or exploration video game, featuring tall trees and thick underbrush lining both sides of the trail.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night, viewed from a first-person perspective. The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt path surrounded by dense underbrush and tall pine trees that block any view of the sky.

exposed rocks and stones embedded in the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The walk continues deeper into the forest as the path progresses forward. The initial trees pass behind the camera while new dense clusters of trees come into view ahead. The ground shows more rocky patches as the trail winds through the consistently dark and enclosed woodland environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a claustrophobic forest trail that grows increasingly rugged as it delves deeper into the night. It begins by moving steadily forward along a narrow dirt path, flanked by dense underbrush and towering pine trees that completely obscure the sky. As the camera progresses, the initial trees recede behind the viewer while new, thick clusters of woodland emerge ahead to maintain the sense of enclosure. The scene then shifts as the trail winds further into the darkness, with the smooth dirt gradually giving way to rocky patches on the ground. Finally, the movement persists through the consistently dim environment, pushing deeper into the oppressive density of the forest.
